summary: Mode-shifting from the UI: switch a running Claude session's permission mode from a chic ⋯ dropdown in both focus headers. Normal/Accept-edits/Plan cycle in place via targeted Shift+Tab (server re-reads the status-bar capture after each press and caps retries — robust targeting, not blind spam); Bypass is launch-only so it confirms then does a clean relaunch that resumes the same conversation. Pure parse_mode reuses the status-bar markers the detector already matches (classify logic untouched, only ADDED); SessionView.mode + a mode key on the SSE sessions delta keep the menu live-checked to the TRUE mode; a bearer-gated POST /api/sessions/:name/mode endpoint drives it. Frontend adds a reusable <ModeMenu> (Radix dropdown, keyboard-accessible, ≥44pt, live-checked radios), a glanceable mode chip, and a setMode client method. cargo build/test/clippy + bun build/lint all green.
